iterations.summary: Bootstrapped AGI-Codex reinforcement into recruiterstack and seeded repo-specific readiness notes.
evidence: Root AGENTS.md contains funnel contract plus AGI-Codex guidance.
.codex/config.toml, hooks.json, and hook handlers are present.
.agents/agi-codex/ state exists for checkpoints, healing, learning, review, and sync.

Full repo ESLint remains noisy in legacy agents/* code outside the funnel surface.
